title: Hardware Problems
drDigitalIntro:
Hardware problems involve the physical parts of your computer.
• A dim screen is one of the most common — the brightness might be turned down.
• A dead mouse or keyboard? Check the plug or battery.
• Start with the obvious: check your settings, cables, power, and connections.

playgroundTask.goal: You fixed a dim screen by adjusting the brightness

steps.say: The screen looks dim. Click Display in the sidebar to check the brightness.
Drag the Brightness slider up past 80% to brighten the screen.

drDigitalSuccess: You fixed the dim screen! Adjusting brightness is a common hardware fix you can do in Settings. For other hardware issues — check cables and connections first.
drDigitalHint: Click Display in the sidebar, then drag the Brightness slider up to brighten the screen.
